corrections.text: The article presents Abel Avellan's statement "The launch represents the continued execution of a vision once considered impossible: space-based cellular broadband to everyone, everywhere" as a full direct quote attributed with "said Abel Avellan." The cited Investing.com source renders the opening clause as indirect speech, quoting only "the continued execution of a vision once considered impossible: space-based cellular broadband to everyone, everywhere" (i.e., "the launch represents" is the source's own narration, not Avellan's quoted words). The quoted content is otherwise verbatim and the title "founder, chairman, and CEO of AST SpaceMobile" is accurate.
